hooks.command: stray=$(find /Users/zachleavitt/Documents/GitHub/zachsladecode/chasing-the-bear -maxdepth 1 -name '*.png' -o -name '*.jpg' -o -name '*.jpeg' -o -name '*.gif' -o -name '*.webp' 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules); if [ -n "$stray" ]; then echo "IMAGE WARNING: Image files found in project root — move them to src/assets/blog/[post-slug]/ so Astro can optimize them:\n$stray"; fi
